texto: Lead looked to his hand and saw sparkling chunks of glass in the cracks of the road. He saw ants running around the cracks, infinitely small. His blood ran into the cracks, creating rivers for the industrious ants to perplex over. Lead smiled at the creatures, for he understood that there is no difference between them and us in their wanderings and labor.
explicacao: Citação de Nathan Yocum sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Lead looked to his hand and saw sparkling chunks of glass in the cracks of the road. He saw ants …” articula sabedoria, accepting, bloody em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como viagem e bloody.
